case_title: MARK SCHULTE ET AL VS. RYAN FAY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARK SCHULTE. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT RYAN FAY. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FAY, RYAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-21-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS MARK SCHULTE AND AARON DIMET ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN FEY IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,768.00. INCLUDING COSTS. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF SETTLEMENT IS PAID IN FULL BEFORE THE HEARING ON APRIL 21, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, AN APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT WHICH TIME JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO APRIL 21, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. IF NOT APPEARANCES MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHULTE, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT FAY, RYAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,433.63 FILED BY SCHULTE, MARK DIMET, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT FAY, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
